# Functional Requirements Document

## 1. Overview
Short description tying to BRD.

## 2. System Context
High-level diagram or link to `doc/layer-03-orchestration-.md`.

## 3. Functional Requirements
| ID | Requirement | Source (BR) | Priority | Owner |
|-----|-------------|------------|----------|-------|
| FR-001 | ... | BR-001 | High | Eng Team |

## 4. Data Models
Brief data model overview; link to `services/*` schemas or include sample SQL.

## 5. APIs
See `docs/templates/service-api-template.md` for API spec template. Include OpenAPI spec in `api/`.

## 6. Non-Functional Requirements
Performance, scalability, security, compliance.

## 7. Acceptance Criteria
Specific testable criteria.

## 8. Traceability Matrix
Map FR → BR → Test Cases → API endpoints
